refnamediv.refpurpose: plots the results of the cusum test

listitem.para: * res = the results typed list of function dfbeta
* siz = the chosen size dor the test (0.01, 0.05 or 0.1)
* out = the symobolic name of the file where the results are printed (default: %io(2))

refentry.refsection: DESCRIPTION Plots the results of the cusum test. 3 sizes are available, governed by the parameter siz.

refsection.title: EXAMPLE
